title: Get Hired Using AI

modules.title: Why Recruiters Already Use AI
modules.sub: Understand the AI-powered hiring landscape you're entering
modules.description: Learners explore how recruiters and hiring managers already use AI tools to screen, rank, and filter candidates before a human ever reads a resume. By understanding the system from the inside, you can make smarter decisions about how to present yourself from the very first step.

modules.title: Rewriting Your Resume With AI
modules.sub: Transform your resume to match real job descriptions fast
modules.description: You use AI tools to analyze job postings and rewrite your resume so it speaks directly to what each employer is looking for. You practice tailoring language, surfacing the right keywords, and formatting your experience so it clears automated screening systems and catches a recruiter's eye.

modules.title: Cover Letters That Don't Sound Fake
modules.sub: Write cover letters that feel human and get read
modules.description: You learn how to prompt AI to draft cover letters that sound like you — specific, confident, and genuinely relevant to the role. The module focuses on editing AI output critically so the final letter avoids generic filler and actually connects your story to the employer's needs.

modules.title: Finding Jobs Before They're Posted
modules.sub: Use AI to surface hidden and early-stage opportunities
modules.description: You discover how to use AI-powered tools and search strategies to find roles that haven't hit major job boards yet, including referral pipelines and company career pages. You build a proactive outreach approach so you're in the conversation before the competition even starts.

modules.title: Researching Companies in Minutes
modules.sub: Go deep on any employer quickly using AI research tools
modules.description: You use AI to rapidly compile what matters most about a company — its culture, recent news, leadership priorities, and red flags — so you can tailor your application and show up to interviews informed. You practice turning raw research into sharp, specific talking points that signal genuine interest.

modules.title: Prepping for Interviews With AI
modules.sub: Practice tough interview questions with instant AI feedback
modules.description: You run mock interviews using AI tools that simulate real questions based on the role and company you're targeting. You get structured feedback on your answers and refine your responses until they're clear, confident, and tailored — so nothing catches you off guard on the day.

modules.title: Negotiating Offers Using Real Data
modules.sub: Back your salary ask with AI-sourced market intelligence
modules.description: You use AI to research compensation benchmarks, cost-of-living factors, and industry norms so you walk into any negotiation knowing your number and why it's reasonable. You practice scripting negotiation conversations with AI so you can push back professionally without second-guessing yourself.

modules.title: Build Your Job Search System
modules.sub: Turn everything you've learned into one repeatable workflow
modules.description: You design a personal job search system that connects all the AI tools and strategies from the course into a single, repeatable process you can use for every application. By the end, you have a working workflow — not just a set of tactics — that compounds your advantage the longer you use it.

synopsis: You're competing against hundreds of applicants â many of whom are already using AI to get ahead. This course teaches you exactly how to use AI tools at every stage of your job search so you stand out, not just keep up.
rationale: Young adults entering the job market face AI-screened applications and AI-assisted competition, yet most have no practical guidance on how to use these same tools to their own advantage.
learning_outcome: After this course, you can build a full AI-assisted job search workflow â from tailored resumes and cover letters to interview prep and salary negotiation â that gives you a real edge over other applicants.
